name: PixiJS

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need many 2D sprites, particles, filters, or a stable frame-by-frame WebGL scene instead of hand-written canvas/WebGL, which fails at batching, texture lifecycles, GPU render loops, and interaction hit-testing. Do not use it for statistical charts, complete game rules, or 3D scenes.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally draw only a small number of Canvas2D primitives. It cannot handle WebGL batching for hundreds or thousands of objects, texture caching, scene-tree transforms, and a unified ticker. PixiJS delegates the high-performance 2D rendering foundation to a stable upstream.

data_in.note: This is a high-frequency trimmed layer over PixiJS v8 Graphics: boot uses async Application.init, then maps every item directly to Graphics.rect/circle().fill(). For more complex Sprite/Assets/Filter scenes, the consuming AI extends the same native app/stage API.

schema.background?: CSS color string | number -- entry defaults to '#0b1020'

shapes.x: number -- rectangle top-left x; circle center x
shapes.y: number -- rectangle top-left y; circle center y
shapes.width?: positive number -- rectangle width; defaults to 80
shapes.height?: positive number -- rectangle height; defaults to 80
shapes.radius?: positive number -- circle radius; defaults to 40
shapes.fill: CSS color string | number -- fill color

spec.note: Application.init({resizeTo:el}) takes pixel dimensions from container clientWidth/clientHeight. boot explicitly fixes the container height at 400px; do not use vh or percentage heights. ResizePlugin tracks container-size changes.

when_to_use: 需要大量 2D 精灵、粒子、滤镜或稳定逐帧 WebGL 画面时用它,而非手写 canvas/WebGL——原生手写在批处理、纹理生命周期、GPU 渲染循环和交互命中上失败。非做统计图、完整游戏规则或 3D 场景。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画少量 Canvas2D 图元,做不到成百上千对象的 WebGL batching、纹理缓存、场景树变换与统一 ticker；PixiJS 把高性能 2D 渲染底座交给稳定上游。

data_in.note: 这是 PixiJS v8 Graphics 高频裁剪层：boot 用 async Application.init,再把每项精确映射到 Graphics.rect/circle().fill()；更复杂 Sprite/Assets/Filter 场景由消费 AI沿用同一 app/stage 原生 API 扩展。

schema.background?: CSS color string | number —— entry 默认 '#0b1020'

shapes.x: number —— rectangle 左上角 x；circle 圆心 x
shapes.y: number —— rectangle 左上角 y；circle 圆心 y
shapes.radius?: positive number —— circle 半径；默认 40
shapes.fill: CSS color string | number —— 填充色

spec.note: Application.init({resizeTo:el}) 从容器 clientWidth/clientHeight 取像素尺寸；boot 把容器显式固定为 400px 高,禁止 vh/百分比高。ResizePlugin 会跟随容器尺寸变化。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):pixi.js@8/+esm 命名导入,await app.init({resizeTo:固定高容器}),挂 app.canvas 后向 app.stage 加 Graphics。

example._why: PixiJS v8 的异步 init、rectangle 左上角与 circle 圆心语义容易混淆,minimal 固定两种几何和 fill 写法。

uplink: 纯显示/本地交互引擎,不定义统一事件出口；指针命中、ticker 状态与业务上行由消费 AI 用 PixiJS 原生 API 自行连接。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:需 WebGL 或 Canvas renderer；基础 Graphics 无图片/CDN CSS/uplink
carriers.widget: supported:Application 生成的 canvas 可直接挂 shadow 内容器,无 document.head 注入；外部纹理另受图片 CDN/CORS 能力约束
carriers.codex: supported:ESM + WebGL/Canvas；外部 Assets URL 需另行满足 CORS

isolation.evidence: NO document.head.appendChild/insertRule in the bundle (confirmed absent) — style-clean. Render path appends the canvas to the given (shadow) container. However the default AccessibilitySystem registers a globalThis `keydown` and, on Tab, appends its accessibility <div> to document.body; ResizePlugin adds a window `resize` (resizeTo is used); EventSystem adds pointer/mouse listeners; image-extract appends a temp <a> only on explicit call. These are lazy/opt-in, not in the basic draw path — so the catalog's widget:'supported' is slightly optimistic; rendering is shadow-safe but accessibility adds a global keydown + body div ⇒ conditional. Cleaned on app.destroy().
